title: CustomOntology
description: A user-authored extension to the canonical OpenMetadata ontology. Custom classes and properties live in the om-extension: namespace and never collide with the read-only canonical om: namespace.

uri.description: Full URI of the class. Must start with the om-extension: namespace.

subClassOf.description: Parent class URIs. May reference canonical om: classes (e.g. om:DataAsset) or other custom classes within this same extension. Must not be empty.

customProperty.description: A user-defined OWL ObjectProperty or DatatypeProperty.

uri.description: Full URI of the property. Must start with the om-extension: namespace.

domain.description: URI of the property's rdfs:domain (the class instances this property applies to).

range.description: URI of the property's rdfs:range. For DatatypeProperty, an XSD datatype URI; for ObjectProperty, a class URI.

name.description: Stable identifier for the extension. Lowercase letters, digits, hyphen.

description.description: Markdown description of the extension. Should explain why these classes/properties are needed.

classes.description: Custom OWL classes defined by this extension.

properties.description: Custom OWL properties defined by this extension.
